summary: Iteration 214 - Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 4 bug fixes verified: (1) Widget overlap fixed - CosmicAssistant at bottom:148px, CosmicMixer at bottom:80px with no overlap. (2) SmartDock snap-shut fixed - panels stay open when clicking inside due to stopPropagation wrappers. (3) StarChart coordinate freeze fixed - raDecToXYZ handles NaN/Infinity with isFinite guards. (4) Balance score localStorage cache working - score persisted in 'cosmic_balance_score' key.
critical_code_review_comments: CosmicAssistant.js line 207: bottom: 148px - VERIFIED correct position
CosmicMixer.js line 939: z-[9996] with bottom-20 (80px) - VERIFIED correct position
SmartDock.js lines 272-297: stopPropagation wrappers on panel containers - VERIFIED working
StarChart.js lines 22-30: raDecToXYZ with isFinite guards for ra, dec, radius - VERIFIED safe fallbacks
Botany.js lines 480-493: localStorage cache for cosmic_balance_score - VERIFIED caching works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 214 verified 4 bug fixes: (1) Widget overlap - CosmicAssistant button moved from bottom:88px to bottom:148px to avoid collision with CosmicMixer at bottom:80px. Both widgets now have different z-indexes (9998 vs 9996). (2) SmartDock snap-shut - Panel containers now wrapped in div with onClick+onPointerDown stopPropagation to prevent event bubbling to parent dock. (3) StarChart coordinate freeze - raDecToXYZ function now validates inputs with isFinite() before computing coordinates, with safe fallbacks (0 for ra/dec, 50 for radius). (4) Balance score caching - Botany.js now caches balance score in localStorage under 'cosmic_balance_score' key on fetch, and loads cached value immediately on page load for faster UI.
